app.shortDescription: Generate articles, image sets, storyboards, and delivery checklists in Claw.
ui.runtime.summary: Content Factory is connected to the Lime host. The center stays in Claw for conversation and execution, while the right Article Workspace carries articles, image sets, storyboards, and delivery checklists.
ui.runtime.centerValue: Claw conversation, execution, and approval flow
ui.runtime.rightValue: Article Workspace preview, editing, and evidence
